hero.title: Your taxi in
hero.subtitle: Book your taxi with real-time tracking. Reach any municipality on the island safely, quickly, and with fixed prices.

howItWorks.subtitle: Booking your taxi is easy. Follow these 3 steps and you'll be on your way.

1.title: Request your taxi
1.desc: Tell us where you are and your destination. Choose the vehicle type you need.

2.title: Track your taxi in real time
2.desc: Once assigned, you can see your taxi on the map and the estimated arrival time.

3.title: Enjoy the ride
3.desc: Hop in and travel worry-free. Secure cashless payment if you prefer.

municipalities.title: The 7 municipalities of
municipalities.subtitle: We operate across the whole island. Select your municipality and we’ll pick you up wherever you are.

items.haria: Valley of a thousand palm trees

reviews.onlyRating: This user only left a rating.

footer.tagline: The smartest way to move around Lanzarote. Book your taxi with real-time tracking and reach any municipality on the island safely.

messages.registerSuccess: Account created successfully. Please sign in.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least {min} characters
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
errors.recaptchaFailed: reCAPTCHA validation failed. Reload the page and try again.

reservations.title: My Bookings
reservations.subtitle: History and live tracking of your trips

rate.title: Rate trip
rate.success: Thanks! Your rating has been saved.

cancel.title: Cancel booking?
cancel.textNoCharge: Are you sure you want to cancel this trip? Since it hasn’t been accepted by any driver yet, you won’t be charged.
cancel.textWithCharge: Are you sure you want to cancel this trip? The full amount will be charged and, if your wallet balance is insufficient, a debt will be created.

reservations.empty: There are no trips to show
